title: AutoUpdate key not supported on kube systemd quadlet but mentioned in the docs
body:
### Issue Description

The documentation [list the `AutoUpdate` as a supported key](https://docs.podman.io/en/latest/markdown/podman-systemd.unit.5.html#id1) in the `[Kube]` section of a quadlet. After configuring this key and running a generator dryrun (`/usr/lib/systemd/system-generators/podman-system-generator --user --dryrun`), the command outputs the following:

```sh
quadlet-generator[1236]: Loading source unit file /home/[username]/.config/containers/systemd/[service-name].kube
quadlet-generator[1236]: converting "[service-name].kube": unsupported key 'AutoUpdate' in group 'Kube' in /home/[username]/.config/containers/systemd/[service-name].kube
```

Which indicates to me that the latest release implementation and documentation are out of sync. Version info:
```shell
~$ podman version
Client:       Podman Engine
Version:      4.6.1
API Version:  4.6.1
Go Version:   go1.18.1
Built:        Thu Jan  1 00:00:00 1970
OS/Arch:      linux/amd64
```

### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue
1. Create kube file at: `/home/[username]/.config/containers/systemd/[service-name].kube`
2. Do a dry-run of the generator: `/usr/lib/systemd/system-generators/podman-system-generator --user --dryrun`


### Describe the results you received

```sh
quadlet-generator[1236]: Loading source unit file /home/[username]/.config/containers/systemd/[service-name].kube
quadlet-generator[1236]: converting "[service-name].kube": unsupported key 'AutoUpdate' in group 'Kube' in /home/[username]/.config/containers/systemd/[service-name].kube
```

### Describe the results you expected

I would expect a generator systemd service output with the autoupdate value mapped. Example:

```shell
$ /usr/lib/systemd/system-generators/podman-system-generator --user --dryrun
quadlet-generator[1343]: Loading source unit file /home/[username]/.config/containers/systemd/[service-name].kube
---[service-name].service---
[Unit]
Description=[service-name]
After=local-fs.target
SourcePath=/home/[username]/.config/containers/systemd/[service-name].kube
RequiresMountsFor=%t/containers

[X-Kube]
Yaml=/opt/[service-name]/[service-name].yaml
AutoUpdate=local

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target default.target


[Service]
KillMode=mixed
Environment=PODMAN_SYSTEMD_UNIT=%n
Type=notify
NotifyAccess=all
SyslogIdentifier=%N
ExecStart=/usr/bin/podman kube play --replace --service-container=true /opt/[service-name]/[service-name].yaml
ExecStopPost=/usr/bin/podman kube down /opt/[service-name]/[service-name].yaml
```

### Podman in a container

### Privileged Or Rootless

Rootless

### Upstream Latest Release

Yes

### Additional environment details

Additional environment details

### Additional information

Additional information like issue happens only occasionally or issue happens with a particular architecture or on a particular setting

comments.body:
Thanks for reaching out!

The docs point to `latest` which means the current development branch.  The docs of the most recent release are in `stable` on the bottom right corner (see https://docs.podman.io/en/stable/markdown/podman-systemd.unit.5.html).
